title: VOYAGER: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models

defines.name: VOYAGER
defines.definition: An LLM-powered embodied lifelong learning agent for Minecraft that autonomously explores, acquires skills, and makes new discoveries using code-based actions and a growing skill library.

problem: Existing embodied agents are not lifelong learners and struggle to systematically explore, accumulate skills, and generalize over long time spans in open-ended environments like Minecraft.
